daily.today_energy: The universe is giving you that 'main character energy' vibe today. You're grounded, sensual, and honestly? People can feel it. This is your moment to lean into your natural magnetism and let things unfold without forcing them.
daily.love: Whether you're partnered or solo, your emotional authenticity is peak right now. If you've been holding back how you really feel about someone, the cosmos is lowkey nudging you to speak your truth. Real recognizes real.
daily.career: Your practical energy is stronger than usual—ideas you've been sitting on are ready to move. Trust your instincts about what feels right, and don't overthink opportunities that align with your values. Progress over perfection.
daily.health: Your body's asking for more intentional movement and rest in equal measure. Whether that's a walk, stretching, or just unplugging from your phone, listen to what feels nourishing. Self-care isn't selfish; it's necessary.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to lean into your sensual side while staying grounded in what actually matters. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to release what no longer serves your peace. Trust your gut—it's been right before.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, there's a magnetic energy around you rn. It's not about grand gestures; it's about showing up authentically. If you've been hesitant to have a real conversation, this is your sign to just go for it.
weekly.career: Your natural talent for seeing the big picture is about to shine. Don't dim yourself down in meetings or group chats. Your ideas have weight, and people are actually listening harder than you think. Channel that steady bull energy.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually feel things instead of rushing through. Movement that feels good—not punishment—is your vibe this week. Hydrate, rest, and maybe try something that makes you feel connected to yourself.
